sub_problems: How should an agent represent memory items so that the same conceptual node can carry different interpretations and downstream successors depending on which task-path is currently traversing it?
How should retrieval be path-conditioned — given the agent's current trajectory of recent nodes, retrieve the next node along the implied path rather than the globally most-similar embedding?
How should multiple overlapping paths through the same node be reconciled when they imply conflicting downstream sequences, and what is the right precedence rule?
How should cross-task transfer be supported through shared path infrastructure — when path A and path B share a segment, what protocol governs whether learnings from A propagate to B?
